Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Julie Grebel, Esq. for Petitioner: Susan Maxwell, present as guardian ad litem for: Destiny Taylor, a minor Claimant. Order granting waiver of appearance filed 4-1-04.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved (only as to the PETITION for hearing today.) as follows:
Reimbursement of $499.52
Attorney's fees: $1,431.37
The Balance of the settlement proceeds of $4,294.11 shall be disbursed to the Petitioner: Susan Maxwell, to be held in trust for the benefit of the Minor, and no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order.
Order signed in court.
